data.title: 2.5周年网页活动「2.5-Year Festival The Planning Committee」
data.summary: [2.5-Year Festival Web Event] The Planning Committee is working hard on the upcoming 2.5-Year Annive
data.body:
[2.5-Year Festival Web Event]

The Planning Committee is working hard on the upcoming 2.5-Year Anniversary Festival!
Check out the special episodes and collect your event gifts!

🗓️Event Period: 5/14 (Tue) After Maintenance ~ 5/28 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2566665
